sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81026" key="periagkw/nisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιαγκών-ισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, τό</foreign> <sense id="n81026.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tying of the hands behind the back</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
